blended.narrative: Wintergreen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 62°F.
Tuesday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
